subcodes.first_line: My God, my God! This is a servant who hath abandoned self and desire, and hath been set aflame with the fire of Thy love which burneth in his breast [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: إلهی إلهی هذا عبد ترک النفس و الهوی و اشتعل بنار محبتک الملتهبة بين الضلوع
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @servitude; submission to God; repentance, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for service
